allow: Bash(node -e "const a = require\(''./lib/albums.json''\); console.log\(''Total:'', a.length\); console.log\(''Recognizable:'', a.filter\(x=>x.recognizable\).length\); console.log\(''Deep cuts:'', a.filter\(x=>!x.recognizable\).length\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const a = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''C:/Users/nonoa/Desktop/album-club/lib/albums.json'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''Total:'', a.length\); console.log\(''Recognizable:'', a.filter\(x=>x.recognizable\).length\); console.log\(''Deep cuts:'', a.filter\(x=>!x.recognizable\).length\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const a = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''C:/Users/nonoa/Desktop/album-club/lib/albums.json'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''Total:'', a.length\); console.log\(''Recognizable:'', a.filter\(function\(x\){return x.recognizable}\).length\); console.log\(''Deep cuts:'', a.filter\(function\(x\){return !x.recognizable}\).length\);")

Bash(node -e "const a = require\(''./lib/albums.json''\); console.log\(''Total:'', a.length, ''With images:'', a.filter\(x=>x.image\).length, ''JSON size:'', JSON.stringify\(a\).length + '' bytes''\)")

Bash(node -e "const a = require\(''./lib/albums.json''\); const noImg = a.filter\(x => !x.image\).length; const noYt = a.filter\(x => x.recognizable && !x.youtubeId\).length; const recog = a.filter\(x => x.recognizable\).length; const withYt = a.filter\(x => x.recognizable && x.youtubeId\).length; console.log\(''Total albums:'', a.length\); console.log\(''Missing cover art:'', noImg\); console.log\(''Recognizable:'', recog\); console.log\(''With YouTube IDs:'', withYt, ''/'', recog\); console.log\(''Missing YouTube IDs:'', noYt\);")

Bash(node -e "const a = require\(''./lib/albums.json''\); const noImg = a.filter\(x => x.image === null\).length; const recog = a.filter\(x => x.recognizable\).length; const withYt = a.filter\(x => x.recognizable && x.youtubeId\).length; console.log\(''Total:'', a.length, ''Missing covers:'', noImg, ''YouTube:'', withYt + ''/'' + recog\);")
Bash(node -e "const l = require\(''./lib/lyrics.json''\); console.log\(''Lyrics entries:'', Object.keys\(l\).length\);")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\(''./lib/lyrics.json''\); const keys = Object.keys\(l\); console.log\(''Total:'', keys.length\); console.log\(''Sample key:'', keys[0]\); console.log\(''Sample value type:'', typeof l[keys[0]]\); console.log\(''Sample value:'', JSON.stringify\(l[keys[0]]\).substring\(0, 200\)\);")
